description: Questo sub-concetto cattura le emozioni associate all'esperienza di luce o buio. La luce può evocare sensazioni di calore, sicurezza o rivelazione, mentre il buio può suscitare paura o incertezza.
positive: The warm sunlight on my skin felt *caldo* and reassuring, a gentle embrace.
A beam of light brought a feeling of *sécurité*, easing the tension in my shoulders.
The dappled light filtering through the leaves evoked a sense of peaceful *Zufriedenheit*.
The bright light caused a subtle, pleasant warmth to spread through my chest.
Seeing the sunrise felt *tranquilo*, a quiet joy settling in my stomach.
The focused light illuminated the details, bringing a feeling of *satisfacción*.
A shaft of light felt *bien* against my eyelids, a comforting sensation.
The golden light on my face inspired a feeling of quiet *Freude*.
The light’s glow made my jaw relax, a subtle feeling of ease.
The sudden light felt *rassigurante*, a calmness washing over my limbs.
Luminositas in oculis meis, a feeling of serene acceptance.
La lumière directe sur mon visage, une sensation de *contentement* léger.
The light felt *gut* on my forehead, a gentle, uplifting feeling.
El brillo de la luz me hizo sentir *alegre*, un pequeño cosquilleo en mi abdomen.
The light's intensity brought a feeling of quiet, internal *Wonne*.
Una luce tenue mi fece sentire *bene*, una sensazione di calma profonda.
The light felt *agréable* on my fingertips, a comforting warmth.
Licht auf meiner Wange, eine leichte Empfindung von *Glück*.
The light felt *feliz* in my throat, a subtle release of tension.
La luce mi fece sorridere, una sensazione di *gioia* silenziosa.
A beam of light felt *positiv* on my back, easing the stiffness.
La luminosidad en mi mano, un *tranquilo* sentimiento de paz.
The light felt *gut* in my eyes, a subtle sense of clarity and calm.
La lumière sur ma poitrine, une sensation de *bien-être* tranquille.
The light felt *nett* on my neck, a comforting sensation of warmth.
El resplandor de la luz me hizo sentir *cómodo*, una sensación de alivio.
La luce mi fece sentire *sereno*, una sensazione di calma profonda.
The light felt *gut* in my fingertips, a subtle sense of warmth.
La lumière sur mon épaule, une sensation de *soulagement* léger.
The light felt *nett* on my forehead, a feeling of quiet peace.
negative: The sudden darkness created a *peur* in my stomach, a tightening sensation.
The oppressive darkness brought a feeling of *Angst*, a constriction in my chest.
The lack of light made my hands tremble, a subtle feeling of *Unbehagen*.
The encroaching darkness caused a wave of *miedo* to wash over my body.
The deep darkness felt *inquiétant*, a prickling sensation on my skin.
The fading light brought a feeling of *malestar*, a tension in my jaw.
The darkness made my breath shallow, a feeling of *crainte* rising within me.
The lack of light made my heart race, a feeling of *Beklommenheit*.
The darkness felt *aterrador* in my throat, a tightening, unpleasant sensation.
The dim light caused a slight tremor in my fingers, a feeling of *ansia*.
Tenebris in oculis meis, a feeling of unsettling vulnerability.
L'obscurité sur mon visage, une sensation de *malaise* grandissante.
The darkness felt *schlecht* on my forehead, a tightening, uncomfortable feeling.
La oscuridad me hizo sentir *asustado*, un pequeño nudo en mi estómago.
The darkness felt *unheimlich*, a subtle chill running down my spine.
Una luce che scompare, una sensazione di *paura* che mi stringe il petto.
The darkness felt *désagréable* on my fingertips, a tightening sensation.
Dunkelheit auf meiner Wange, ein leichtes Gefühl von *Furcht*.
The darkness felt *triste* in my throat, a knot of unease.
La luce che si affievolisce, una sensazione di *angoscia* che mi pervade.
The darkness brought a feeling of *Angst* to my back, a tightening in my shoulders.
La oscuridad en mi mano, una *inquietud* palpable.
The darkness felt *schlecht* in my eyes, a subtle sense of unease and tension.
La lumière sur ma poitrine, une sensation de *malaise* grandissante.
The darkness felt *nett* on my neck, a feeling of discomfort and apprehension.
La oscuridad me hizo sentir *nervioso*, una sensación de tensión.
La luce che svanisce, una sensazione di *terrore* che mi paralizza.
The darkness felt *schlecht* in my fingertips, a tightening, uncomfortable sensation.
La lumière sur mon épaule, une sensation de *malaise* grandissante.
The darkness felt *nett* on my forehead, a feeling of dread and anxiety.
